items.title: [DC] vxvendetta97@🔸服务器公告┊server-announcement:   亲爱的守密人： 为了维护《忘却前夜》社区的秩序与环境，我们将在近期明确并加强社区规范的执行。 本着透明与公平的
items.summary:
亲爱的守密人：
为了维护《忘却前夜》社区的秩序与环境，我们将在近期明确并加强社区规范的执行。
本着透明与公平的原则，现具体说明如下：
● 露骨的NSFW内容将在本社区内被禁止，尤其是针对儿童的露骨言论。
这里所说的“露骨NSFW”，指的是任何直白的色情内容（包括视频、图片、文字等）以及对血腥、暴力等画面过于详细的描述。
我们之做出强调，是因为《忘却前夜》官方Discord是一个公开的社区。我们有责任确保所有用户在此获得良好的体验，同时保证本社区是一处适合所有年龄层的安全空间。
感谢大家的理解与配合！如有举报需求或因任何原因想要联系管理员，请使用  指令。


Hi everyone. We wanted to reaffirm the moderation stance for this server to reflect what is stated in the rules. 
In the interest of transparency and fairness, we would like to clarify how some boundaries will be enforced from now on.

Explicit NSFW comments and discussion: Not permitted (especially towards children)

By explicit, we mean anything pornographic or directly referencing sexual acts, or excessively graphic mentions of gore and violence.

Because the Morimens official discord is a public server. Please understand that we have a responsibility to ensure that all users have a good experience here, and that the Morimens discord is safe and age-appropriate for all of them.
Every infraction and response will be evaluated case-by-case.

Thank you for your understanding. Remember that if you have reports to make, or if you need to contact moderators for any reason, you can use
items.author: vxvendetta97

items.title: [DC] iwthahe@🔸有問必答┊official-q-a: Yes I pulled Saya and then decided to play Saya no Uta, yep, that's me, my bad I
items.summary:
Yes I pulled Saya and then decided to play Saya no Uta, yep, that's me, my bad I guess, don't want that thing on my account anymore. Mine is a situation that can happen to, well... a small amount of silly people i guess, but more ways to get an Origin of Time would help a lot in dealing with occasional regret, especially since it's more likely to happen with collab characters and we will see more of those.

Also, one copy of hers is given for free, would be nice to have some way of avoiding that too, a choice to pick something else as a reward, idk.
items.author: iwthahe
